creator: dillon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This bug is believed to be fixed in -stable ( and thus in the upcoming 
3.1 release ), and also fixed in -current.  It turned out that an  
optimization in the old swapper was causing dirty pages to be 'lost' 
and resulting in stale pages being reloaded from swap.  The optimization 
was removed.
